keyPointsSummary: 'manufacture/produce' + noun describes what a factory makes
'import' = bring goods in, 'export' = send goods out — object always follows
'quality control' and 'supply chain' are fixed two-word industry terms
Passive voice is common in industry contexts (raw material is imported)

quickQuiz.answer: The machine runs day and night.

quickQuiz.hindi: मजदूर मेहनत से काम करते हैं।
मैनेजर टीम को निर्देश देता है।
quickQuiz.answer: The manager gives instructions to the team.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह उद्योग तेजी से बढ़ रहा है।
हम कच्चा माल विदेश से मंगाते हैं।
quickQuiz.answer: We import raw material from abroad.

quickQuiz.hindi: भारत कपड़े दूसरे देशों को निर्यात करता है।
quickQuiz.answer: India exports clothes to other countries.

mustRememberRules: 'manufacture/produce' + noun describes what a factory makes
'import' = bring goods in, 'export' = send goods out — object always follows
'quality control' and 'supply chain' are fixed two-word industry terms
Passive voice is common in industry contexts (raw material is imported)
